understanding.goal_understanding: The goal in each level was to get all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the level reports WIN, and then continue through all levels until the overall run reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A piece could be controlled/selected and then moved. CLICK on a position attempted to move the currently selected piece to that target tile (typically along allowed movement rules); if the path/target was blocked by walls/obstacles or otherwise invalid, the piece stayed in place but still consumed a step. MOVE_RIGHT (and presumably other directional moves) moved the selected piece one tile in that direction if not blocked, otherwise it would not move. Obstacles/walls prevented movement into/through them. Selection stayed on the same piece across actions unless explicitly changed; actions always applied to the currently selected piece.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1/2 failed after 64 turns. Restarting the same level.
Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
